response:
Subject: Appreciation for Your Support and Clarification on FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C

Dear Mr. Klimkovic,

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I appreciate the time and effort you've taken to assist me.

Regarding the current machine vision setup, I would like to clarify that the device in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data provided, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor. I have attached the relevant technical documentation to this email for your reference.

Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, specifically page 18, for the detailed datasheet, and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13, for the Quantum efficiency information. I will carefully study these files and manuals and get back to you with any further questions or insights.

Thank you again for your support.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
